brainstorm.reviewerNotes: Brainstorm artifact = parent project PRD at docs/projects/P003-entity-system-redesign/prd.md. Scope crystallized via project decomposition: F11 (6-type taxonomy with kind + lifecycle_class), F2 (phase_events as sole state-change primitive), F3 (atomic promotion + drop enforce_immutable_entity_type trigger), F12 (split register_entity raises-on-conflict from upsert_entity idempotent; audit 14+ call sites). Same pattern as predecessor feature 108.

specify.reviewerNotes: Spec-reviewer: 3 iterations (9 blockers + 17 warnings cumulatively, all resolved). Phase-reviewer: 2 iterations (3 warnings + 1 suggestion in iter 1, 2 warnings in iter 2 — all resolved in-line). Final approved with no unresolved issues.

design.reviewerNotes: Design-reviewer: 3 iterations (cap-3 reached, 2 cumulative blockers + 5 warnings all resolved inline in rev 4 — workspace_uuid plumbing in append_phase_event, register_entity parent_uuid fixup removal documented, FTS5 line citations corrected). Phase-reviewer: 1 iteration (3 warnings fixed inline: AC-4.1 exception location, §9 three-branch, plus 2 plan-scope suggestions). Cross-phase spec patch in iter-1 of design: FR-4 body reconciled with AC-4.4 status-only update. Plan-phase scope carried: reader-rewrite file list discovery (grep + sizing), SQLite version check for ALTER TABLE DROP COLUMN, insert_phase_event rename commit-step placement.

create-plan.reviewerNotes: Plan-reviewer: 2 iterations (6 + 1 blockers resolved cumulatively). Task-reviewer: 1 iteration (5 blockers resolved inline). Phase-reviewer: 1 iteration (3 blockers + 5 warnings all resolved inline in tasks rev 5). NEW tasks added: 2.6 type_id byte-identity, 13.7.1 inspect.signature byte-identity, 14.4 5 non-entities idempotency tests, 16.4a idempotency test, 16.4b lock-failure test, expanded Task 10.1 with workflow_phases grep. Group 12 dependency corrected from Group 11 (REMOVED) to Group 10. Plan covers 16 Groups + Group 0.5 rename + Group 11 REMOVED placeholder. ~70 total tasks. Cross-phase patches applied to spec (FR-4 body status-only) during design phase still in effect.
